Brittany washes her hair every other day, which means she uses shampoo 182 times in a leap year of 366 days. Since she uses 1/4 ounce per wash, her total consumption for the year is 45.5 ounces, requiring her to purchase [number] bottles to cover this amount.

Each bottle holds 14 ounces, so dividing the total needed by the bottle size shows she must buy four bottles to have enough supply for the entire period. She should visit the store at [location] to ensure she has the necessary product before running out.
